esp32_camera_webserver_init.message0: Initialize ESP32 camera server %1 Camera model %2 Resolution %3 Pixel format %4
esp32_camera_webserver_init.tooltip: Initialize the ESP32 camera and configure camera parameters

esp32_camera_custom_pins.message0: Custom camera pin configuration %1 Data pins D0-D7 %2 XCLK pin %3 PCLK pin %4 VSYNC pin %5 HREF pin %6 SDA pin %7 SCL pin %8 PWDN pin %9 RESET pin %10
esp32_camera_custom_pins.tooltip: Use this block to configure the camera pins when 'Custom Pins' is selected. Data pin format: '11,12,13,14,15,16,17,18'

esp32_camera_set_quality.tooltip: Set JPEG compression quality (0-63, the smaller the value, the higher the quality)

esp32_camera_set_flip.message0: Set camera flip %1 vertical flip %2 horizontal mirror %3
esp32_camera_set_flip.tooltip: Set up camera image flipping and mirroring

esp32_camera_set_brightness.message0: Set up the camera %1 Brightness %2 Contrast %3 Saturation %4
esp32_camera_set_brightness.tooltip: Adjust camera brightness, contrast and saturation (-2 to 2)

esp32_camera_capture.tooltip: Obtain a frame of camera screen data and return the frame object (⚠️ Used with the 'unsigned long integer' variable, the release frame block must be called after use)

esp32_camera_frame_buffer.tooltip: Get the memory pointer (uint8_t*) of the frame data, which can be used for display or transmission

esp32_camera_frame_len.tooltip: Get the byte length of frame data

esp32_camera_frame_width.tooltip: Get the width of the frame image (pixels)

esp32_camera_frame_height.tooltip: Get the height of the frame image (pixels)

esp32_camera_release.tooltip: Release the frame buffer memory (must be called after using the frame, the send_serial block will be automatically released)

esp32_camera_send_serial.tooltip: Send JPEG image data through the serial port (with frame identifier, can be used for host computer display)

esp32_camera_capture_and_encode_base64.message0: Take a photo and convert to Base64
esp32_camera_capture_and_encode_base64.tooltip: Take a photo and encode its JPEG data into Base64 format

esp32_camera_print_diagnostics.tooltip: Print camera initialization status, sensor PID and common error troubleshooting tips through the serial port
